highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “The bull case Monday is that ES can do some back-testing of the zones we broke down yesterday and today.

I wrote Monday at 4pm: “We’ve had a spectacular squeeze today and the bull case played out fully for the complete backtest of 6361-65, so there is little for me to write about here until we get a good pullback again.
When it comes to how to buy those dips, I buy them the exact same way institutions do: Via Failed Breakdowns.
ES always follows the same sequence after a sell: A slew of negative headlines/catalyts causes price to go ‘elevator down’ and sell vertically through supports.

Those who are familiar with the sell cycle though know what comes next: The Failed Breakdown and violent squeeze, with that squeeze frequently targetting the back-test of the zone whose failure initially produced the sell; 6274 in this case.
Today, the agenda would be ES needed to pullback off that back-test, and the mission for bulls would be to buy the dip.

post_title: Can Bulls Sustain The Friday/Monday SPX Rally? August 6 Plan
